title: MESIE Edge Robotics Spectral Dataset (MERSD v1.0)
description: Open spectral robotics corpus for edge UAV swarms under EW contest and industrial ground-robot condition monitoring. Each episode includes MESIE spectral JSON records, 256-d multi-modal fusion embeddings, neuromorphic spike features, and swarm/fault/jam labels. Fills gap vs vision-only robotics datasets on Zenodo.
notes: Upload MERSD_v1.0.0.zip to Zenodo. Target communities: robotics, UAV, condition monitoring. Economic impact track: ent_factory_vibration episodes.
